characters.name: Abadnego
characters.description: AbednegoGenderMaleOccupationGangster (Soldier)AgeunknownPlace of OriginMiami, Florida, USARelativesunknownFirst AppearancePilotLast AppearancePilotActorReggie PierreStatusAlive Abednegowas a gangster who worked forSugarin Miami. He was ordered by Sugar to forceMichael Westenout of his home so he can continue to operate.Fiona Glenannesubdued him and Michael decided to driveSugarout.

characters.name: Anwar
characters.description: AnwarGenderMaleOccupationOperativeAgeUnrevealedPlace of OriginLibyaRelativesUnknownFirst AppearanceEpisode 108: Wanted ManLast AppearanceEpisode 108: Wanted ManActorMarshall ManeshStatusAlive Anwaris an operative of the Libyan secret service, and an old contact ofFiona Glenanne.Michael Westentraded a useful piece of information to him, in exchange for flushing outPhillip Cowanby having the Libyan secret police send a fruit basket to Cowan.

characters.name: Anwar
characters.description: AnwarGenderMaleOccupationOperativeAgeUnrevealedPlace of OriginLibyaRelativesUnknownFirst AppearanceEpisode 108: Wanted ManLast AppearanceEpisode 108: Wanted ManActorMarshall ManeshStatusAlive Anwaris an operative of the Libyan secret service, and an old contact ofFiona Glenanne.Michael Westentraded a useful piece of information to him, in exchange for flushing outPhillip Cowanby having the Libyan secret police send a fruit basket to Cowan.

characters.name: Eddie Ash
characters.description: Eddie AshGenderMaleOccupationEmbezzler; Financial AdvisorAgeunknownPlace of OriginunknownRelativesunknownFirst AppearanceEpisode 206: Bad BloodLast AppearanceEpisode 206: Bad BloodActorRob BenedictStatusDeceased Eddie Ashwas a financial advisor atSweet Valentine Enterprises. Eddie Ash worked forEddie Valentine, a hip-hop mogul, as a financial advisor and his right-hand man, Eddie having built the business up from scratch. Despite being completely loyal to Valentine, Eddie was truly greedy and cared little for no-one but himself. He was also devious and manipulative, often willing to kill. Eddie's one key weakness was his arrogance and his belief that he had gotten away with the crime which ultimately proved to be his own downfall.

characters.name: Sam Axe
characters.description: Sam AxeGenderMaleOccupationFormer Navy SEALAge69 (2026)RelativesElsa(girlfriend)Amanda(ex-wife)First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceReckoningActorBruce CampbellStatusLiving Samuel "Sam" Axeis the best friend ofMichael Westen, with a long career working in the military and who has had occupations from Navy SEAL to Military Intelligence operative. His long range of careers and operations has ensured a long list of "connections". However, with his espionage days behind him, he has started to become a moocher and drinks heavily. He is currently working with Michael andFiona Glenannedoing various odd jobs. Sam Axe is portrayed byBruce Campbell. Sam was born in approximately 1957. In 1979 he likely graduated from the Naval Academy. He was commissioned into the navy as an Ensign. At some point he joined the United States Navy SEALs. In 2005 he retired from the Navy as a Commander. Once one of the world's top intelligence operatives, Sam has now become a laid-back slacker more concerned about where his next mojito will come from, and which one of his sugar mommas will let him use the apartment for the night. Even though he appears to be nothing more than a wash out, he still has his expertise intact and is very loyal to his friends. Sam has started to help Michael out on his various odd jobs, acts as his father figure and even occasionally lives in Michael's apartment whenever Sam is usually kicked out of a home by a current girlfriend. However, theFBIhas tied up Sam's pension to force him to inform on Michael. Sam's loyalties remain true though, and he only reveals just enough information to keep them happy. He often uses the name Chuck Finley or some variation of it as a cover ID.

characters.name: Carla Baxter
characters.description: Carla BaxterGenderFemaleOccupationThe OrganizationOperative, Case Officer forMichael WestenAgeUnknownPlace of OriginUnknownRelativesUnknownFirst AppearanceLoose Ends, Part 2Last AppearanceLesser EvilActorTricia HelferStatusDeceasedCause of deathGunshot Wounds Carla Baxterwas the alias assumed by a mid-ranking member of a mysterious and seeminglyall-powerful organizationthat is apparently behindMichael Westen's burn notice. In Season 2, it's revealed that she ordered that Michael be burned so that she could use him for various black ops. Throughout the course of the season, she forced Michael to perform a series of apparently unrelated errands for her, which he eventually learned were part of a planned assassination attempt. Before Michael could work to foil the assassination, someone beat him to the punch by killing the assassin and nearly killing Michael in separate explosions. As a member of the group responsible for issuing a burn notice on Michael, Carla often used Michael to carry out various tasks for her. She was also ruthless, often threatening to harm Michael's family and friends unless he agrees to work for her or if he hadn't met a deadline that she'd set.
characters.personality_section: As a member of the group responsible for issuing a burn notice on Michael, Carla often used Michael to carry out various tasks for her. She was also ruthless, often threatening to harm Michael's family and friends unless he agrees to work for her or if he hadn't met a deadline that she'd set.

characters.name: Jason Bly
characters.description: Jason BlyGenderMaleOccupationFederal AgentAgeUnknownPlace of OriginUnknownRelativesUnknownFirst AppearanceUnpaid DebtsLast AppearanceGame ChangeActorAlex CarterStatusDeceasedCause of deathGrenade Jason Blywas aC.S.S.agent. He is portrayed byAlex Carter. InSeason One, Jason Bly was sent down toMiami, Florida, in response to a sensitive information leak provided bySam AxetoFBIagentsHarrisandLane. He assuredMichaelthat as long as he continued to poke about his burn notice, Jason was going to make Michael's life even more difficult. Later on, Michael worked withBarryto blackmail him to back off and hand over Michael's dossier concerning his crimes that led to him being burned. Jason Bly is arrogant and smug when it comes to Michael and his team. He does what he can to make life for them as miserable as possible in seasons 1 and 2. Jason is also reckless when it comes to dangerous situations such as during thehostage crisis. Even as Michael's "friend", he calls the police on him to cover both their tracks. Still, he shows that he has a sense of honor when he takes the blame for someone who's about to be shot and when he tries to save Michael and his team fromOlivia Riley.

characters.description: BorisGenderMaleOccupationWannabe WarlordAgeunknownPlace of OriginRussiaRelativesunknownFirst AppearanceEpisode 101: PilotLast AppearanceEpisode 101: PilotActorDimitri DiatchenkoStatusAlive Boriswas a Russian warlord who operated in Nigeria. Boris did business withMichael Westenbriefly. He had knowledge of Michael's affiliation with theCIA.

characters.name: Tyler Brennen
characters.description: Tyler BrennenGenderMaleOccupationCIA Officer(Formerly), Arms Dealer.AgeunknownPlace of OriginunknownRelativesAnnabelle (daughter)First AppearanceSins of OmissionLast AppearanceOut of the FireActorJay KarnesStatusDeceasedCause of deathStab Wounds Tyler Brennenwas an arms dealer who operated out of Miami. Brennen has a young daughter named Annabelle who is enrolled in a private school in Switzerland for $40,000 per semester. He supports her education as well as his private life by dealing in guns and weapons of mass destruction across international waters. Since his debut appearance, Brennen has proven himself to be one of Michael's most ruthless and sinister enemies. He is only interested in raising money and will resort to kidnapping, blackmail, or murder to help him achieve his goals. He also regularly employs a bodyguard or muscle of some kind to aid him as well. He also seems to have a long-standing grudge againstMichael Westendue to the fact that Michael has managed to foil Brennen's schemes on many occasions, due to Michael's own actions and the help of his friends,Sam AxeandFiona Glenanne. This has caused Brennen to begin developing a hatred for both Sam and Fiona, who have started hating him as well due to his past actions against Michael and his family. However, despite his ruthlessness, Brennen is very devoted to his young daughter, Annabelle; who is in a private school in Switzerland, and it's shown that he is fiercely protective of her to the extent that he swears revenge against Michael if any harm comes to his daughter after Michael fooled Brennen into believing that he had an assassin in Switzerland ready to kill her.

characters.name: Barry Burkowski
characters.description: Barry BurkowskiGenderMaleOccupationMoney LaundererPlace of OriginMiami, Florida, USARelativesPaul Burkowski(Brother)First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceReckoningActorPaul TeiStatusAliveBarry Burkowskiis a money launderer based in Miami. He is portrayed by Paul Tei. Since every person in Miami's underworld - terrorists, drug dealers, or white-collar criminals - needs a money launderer, Barry serves as a sort of "Yellow Pages for criminals". ForMichael Westenas well, who frequently needs Barry's assistance in situations where tracking money can provide a lead. Barry had history with Michael prior to his burn notice. He also has close ties withSam AxeandFiona Glenanne. Barry was once a podiatry student before dropping out. His mother never forgave him for that. He used to forge bad checks, and earned himself the nickname "Bad Check Barry".

characters.name: Carlos
characters.description: Carlos CruzGenderMaleOccupationBounty hunterAgeUnknownPlace of OriginUnknownRelativesUnknownFirst AppearanceNew DealLast AppearanceThings UnseenActorStephen MartinesStatusAlive Carlos Cruzis a bounty hunter who appears inSeason Seven. He becomes Fiona's boyfriend after she ends her relationship with Michael at the end ofSeason Six. He is played byStephen Martines. Fi and Carlos are trying to get a witness to come forward on a murder he saw ten years ago, prompted by an agent trying to take the murderer down. The man is from Carlos’ past and he had turned on them. While trying to negotiate for the witness it is revealed that the agent is working for the murder and Carlos gets taking for exchange. Fi asks Michael to use his connections to help get Carlos. While waiting to see if the connections can help, Michael and Fi go in pretending Michael is the witness. Right before Michael gets shot he gets a call that he tells the men to answer and it is a powerful cartel boss ordering everyone to be let go, he then asks if the man holding the phone knows who he is and what can be done to his family before telling him to shoot the man in charge. It jumps to Fi coming home to Carlos with a bag packed telling her he is moving out, Michael’s network had attacked the cartels compound and killed seven people to get him to make that call. Carlos said that was something he had to live with and that he can’t do this anymore. Fi says I love you and Carlos replies that he loves her too but that she is going down a path with Michael that he can’t accept, she says that she has no choice and he responds that she does and she made her choice.

characters.name: Carmelo
characters.description: Carmelo DanteGenderMaleOccupationHeroin DealerAgeUnrevealedPlace of OriginUnrevealedFirst AppearanceLoose Ends, Part 2Last AppearanceEnemy of My EnemyActorTodd StashwickStatusAlive Carmelo Danteis the second biggest heroin dealer in Miami and one ofMichael Westen's unwilling assets. He is a recurring character that is portrayed byTodd Stashwick. Carmelo Dante was a unwilling asset to Michael when he needed to take down Cowan's bosses after they shot him (Cowan) and threated Michael's family. It was a small role thought to end with him warning Michael that if he sees him again, he will kill Michael. Carmelo appeared again in season 5 "Enemy of My Enemy" in a larger role; still Michael's unwilling asset, he is used to take down a Serbian gang (who is in possession of a Predator Drone) by pitting them against each other and placing Sam into Carmelo's hands as a plant to lead him into starting the war. They succeed in making them fight by having Sam tell Mike and Jesse what is in a captured Serbian's apartment (drugs, a scale and lots of blueberry yogurt). After leading Carmelo to Boxkey Marina they charge into a gun fight, that is ended quickly with Fiona blowing up a gas tank. Mike infiltrates the marina to pull Sam out and Carmelo discovers that there were no drugs and that Michael Westen was behind all this. Angry, he reluctantly lets them both go when cops are heard coming and swears that he will kill Michael next time again. Carmelo was given immunity because of the deal he made with Michael to let Sam go. Mike and Agent Pierce explained to two of Sam's most annoying "not friends" that as long as Carmelo is free he wouldn't talk about how he unwittingly helped the CIA and cops. During his first appearance, "Loose Ends", he was relaxing in a club and drinking champagne when Michael came and forced him to help by threatening to blow up the building. As Mike said, "mutually assured destruction, it works for nuclear weapons, it works for me." At this point he seems to be calm and collected with a normal temper, even when Michael said he would take him and all his men out, he was also calm telling Michael he would kill him the next time he saw him. This might have been because he was the second biggest drug lord in Miami and had no reason to be aggressive or short tempered or else he would cause waves. He is more crazed and aggressive in season 5 "Enemy of My Enemy" (possibly because he was now the biggest drug lord after Michael took down a major heroin trafficker to the original number 1 drug lord), his anger is shown when he personally beats on Sam and a Serbian rather then let a lackey do it, and his crazed nature appears when he took out a switchblade and went right for Sam's throat when he interrogated him rather then just tie him up and talk rationally to him.

characters.description: Lucy ChenGenderFemaleOccupationSecurity Consultant; Ex-SpyAgeunknownPlace of OriginunknownRelativesunknownFirst AppearanceEpisode 101: PilotLast AppearanceEpisode 110: False FlagActorChina ChowStatusAlive  Lucy Chenis a security consultant based in Miami. She issues jobs to her investigators and sometimes will take on cases personally. She is portrayed by China Chow in "Episode 101: Pilot" and "Episode 110: False Flag".

characters.name: Perry Clark
characters.description: "Perry Clark"is the alias adopted by an unknown expert assassin sent byNSAOfficerPhillip Cowanto assassinateMichael Westen. The assassin impersonated the realPerry Clark; aCSSBureaucrat, and contacted Michael under the pretense of holding a departmental review; which, if completely successfully, the recommendation would get him remove him off theBlack Listand revoke hisBurn Notice. Initially, the assassin tried to have Michael come toFort Lauderdalefor an appointment, arranging some things to ensure his death, but Michael, forbidden to travel, made him come toMiami. The assassin pretended to be a harried, hesitant and otherwise common desk-jockey, quickly gaining Michael's approval (having dealt with field operatives before, as well as the methods they employed to ascertain their authenticity); mostly due to Michael talking himself into denying his own instincts; wanting to resolve his burn notice. In truth, the assassin was cool, calming and good at killing people. Eventually, one night, the assassin succeeded into getting into Michael's loft for a meeting. Michael, however, knew that the longer someone has been in the intelligence game, the more the person has to be careful about underestimating an opponent; in Michael's case; he does not think much of bureaucrats, feeling they're not worth his time or attention. As a result, a bureaucrat would be the perfect person to send to kill him. At the last second, Michael stopped the assassin from sneaking up on him and choking him with a garroting wire; concealed in his briefcase under a classified file. The two struggled, with Michael almost dying, but Michael, possessing the home-court advantage, punched open a nearby cupboard near him on the floor and, removing a hidden gun, successfully shot the assassin in the stomach. Giving up his attempt to kill him, the assassin staggered out the loft's door and vanished. The next morning; the Miami City Police Department found the assassin in an alley; he bled to death. There was no ID on him, and his fingerprints didn't show up in any government database, so, officially, he never existed.

In truth, the assassin was cool, calming and good at killing people. Eventually, one night, the assassin succeeded into getting into Michael's loft for a meeting. As a result, a bureaucrat would be the perfect person to send to kill him. At the last second, Michael stopped the assassin from sneaking up on him and choking him with a garroting wire; concealed in his briefcase under a classified file. Giving up his attempt to kill him, the assassin staggered out the loft's door and vanished. The next morning; the Miami City Police Department found the assassin in an alley; he bled to death. characters.name: Tommy D'Antonio
characters.description: Tommy D'AntonioGenderMaleOccupationMiddle ManagerAgeUnrevealedPlace of OriginAllendale,New JerseyFirst AppearanceFearless LeaderActorNicholas Turturro Tommy D'Antoniowas a small-time criminal from Allendale who travelled south to Florida in hopes of better prospects. Instead, he got mixed up with a creep namedMatheson, who had him stealing from drug dealers.Michaelmet up with Tommy to try and get to Matheson, hoping to hand the criminal mastermind over toDet. Paxsonin order to get her off his back. However, when he learned that Tommy wanted to leave the criminal world, he andSamandFionahelped Tommy set up Matheson in a trap.

characters.name: David
characters.description: DavidGenderMaleOccupationStudentAgeunknownPlace of OriginMiami, Florida, USARelativesJavierFirst AppearancePilotLast AppearancePilotActorMauricio SuarezStatusAlive Davidis a student andJavier's son. David is a good-natured kid who looks up to macho tough guys due to his history of being bullied by kids at school. He finally had the chance to stand up and fight for himself thanks to the tutelage ofMichael Westen.

characters.name: Alvaro DeSantos
characters.description:
Alvaro DeSantosGenderMaleOccupationGangster (Distributor), Colombian Drug Cartel, MiamiAgeunknownPlace of OriginMiami, Florida, USARelativesunknownFirst AppearanceFight or FlightLast AppearanceFight or FlightActorIvo LopezStatusDeceased Alvaro DeSantoswas a mid-level distributor for the Colombian Drug Cartel based in Miami. DeSantos had some power over Miami as a mid-level distributor with thugs employed to take out undesirables including 
witnesses, rival gangsters, and innocent people. He employed the services ofBruce Gellman, the cartel's lawyer, to help clear him of any crimes against him.
